description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-contextual-help

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-contextual-help/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE FOR SCORING
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report any wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Trigger icon, popover background, typography. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Trigger button labeling. Popover association (aria-describedby). Keyboard (Enter/Space to toggle, Escape to close). Focus management.
3. **Functionality** — Info vs help variants. Trigger (icon button). Popover positioning. Slot content. Dismiss behavior.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Popover positioning. Z-index.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Toggle. Keyboard. Positioning. ARIA.
8. **Storybook** — Info/help variants. Rich content. Positioning.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Help text integration. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-contextual-help
